{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Titan's Blade technique
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Titan's Blade technique]] can be used to forge blades to a massive size.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Titan's Blade technique]] expands the size of a [[sword]] tenfold.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
